description_long: This is a rectangular, double-basin kitchen or utility sink made from a glossy, dark-colored material, likely a composite or enameled metal. The left side features a large, deep basin, while the right side has a slightly smaller basin and an integrated draining board with raised ridges for water runoff. The basins are separated by a central divider, and the overall design is sleek and modern, with smooth, rounded corners and edges. The surface is highly reflective, indicating a polished finish, and the structure appears robust and suitable for heavy-duty use. There are no visible faucets or overflow holes, and the drain openings are located at the bottom of each basin.
description: A glossy, double-basin rectangular sink with an integrated draining board and smooth, modern contours. The dark finish and reflective surface suggest a durable, high-quality material.
description_view_0: Side view showing the depth of both basins and the raised draining board on the right.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the main basin and the smooth, reflective surface.
description_view_2: Opposite side view showing the larger basin on the left and the draining board on the right.
description_view_3: Rear view focusing on the wide, deep basin and the seamless integration of the draining area.
attribute_drain_location: left basin: center, right basin: center
